From: procurement@acme-corp.de
To: tenders@goautonomous.io
Subject: RFQ - Industrial Workwear Supply 2024/Q2
Date: Mon, 11 Mar 2024 09:14:32 +0100

Dear Go Autonomous Team,

Please find attached our Purchase Order PO-2024-00891 for industrial workwear.

Only quote products on page 3 and page 5.
We need to have the bid no later than 15/04/2026.

Special instructions:
- All prices must be in EUR
- Delivery to our Hamburg warehouse (address on page 1)
- Lead time must not exceed 6 weeks

Best regards,
Klaus Weber
Procurement Department
Acme Corporation GmbH

Attachment: PO-2024-00891_Acme_Corp.pdf (278 KB)
